title: Phase 2B: Zod validators for all domains
description: Create Zod validation schemas for all domains: customer, product, order, dispatch, delivery, receiving, collections, pricing/purchasing, CRM/estimate, and import validators.
steps: Create src/lib/validators/customer.ts (create, update, search, contact, jobsite schemas)
Create src/lib/validators/product.ts (create, update, search, category schemas)
Create src/lib/validators/order.ts (create, update, add item, transition, search schemas)
Create src/lib/validators/dispatch.ts (assign truck, create route, sequence stops schemas)
Create src/lib/validators/delivery.ts (POD capture, COD capture, stop outcome schemas)
Create src/lib/validators/receiving.ts (receive line, discrepancy, vendor issue schemas)
Create src/lib/validators/collections.ts (call log, promise, dispute, payment plan schemas)
Create src/lib/validators/pricing.ts (price import, cost change, quote schemas)
